articles.title: Solana One of the Few Altcoins To Outperform Bitcoin This Week Despite Tuesday’s Network Outage: Santiment
articles.description: Crypto analytics firm Santiment says it has a bullish forecast for Ethereum (ETH) competitor Solana (SOL) despite the smart contract platform suffering a major outage earlier this week.
